LanguageData.Ammo_762x54mmR_FMJ_Punched.label: 7.62x54mmR cartridge (FMJ) (Punched)
LanguageData.Ammo_762x54mmR_FMJ_Punched.description: Rimmed rifle cartridge used by many machine guns, bolt-action and sniper rifles.
